name: crosschain-trusted-transport-prototype
description: Minimal prototype for trusted cross-chain data transport experiments

scripts.fabric:cc:deploy: docker compose -f docker-compose.fabric.yml run --rm fabric-tools bash /fabric-network/fabric-network/scripts/deploy-chaincode.sh
scripts.fabric:cc:invoke: docker compose -f docker-compose.fabric.yml run --rm fabric-tools bash /fabric-network/fabric-network/scripts/invoke-xcall.sh
scripts.fabric:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.fabric.yml up -d fabric-ca.org1.example.com orderer.example.com peer0.org1.example.com peer1.org1.example.com peer2.org1.example.com peer3.org1.example.com
scripts.evm:up: docker compose up -d evm-node tee-verifier tee-verifier-2 tee-verifier-3 tee-verifier-4
scripts.fabric:channel: docker compose -f docker-compose.fabric.yml run --rm fabric-tools bash /fabric-network/fabric-network/scripts/create-channel.sh
scripts.start: node -e "console.log('Use Ubuntu flow: npm run deploy && npm run hxmsg:test:forward after Fabric/EVM/TEE are up')"
